name: Call to Lethal Company
description: The Lethal Company urgently needs interns! Urgently call the employees of the company and not only to find out what it is like to work in a Lethal Company!!
instructions: Control 1 You need to select from the list who you want to call 2 Once selected the call will begin immediately 3 Press the red handset button to end the call 4 Scroll through contacts using the mouse wheel on a computer or swipe on a phone
tags: Funny, Relaxation, Simulation, Simulator, Space, unity, Unity3D, WebGL
